action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed with val AP=0.2359 (new best) at epoch 88, still improving. Time remaining ~18.6 min. Best test AP so far is 0.2136 from much earlier checkpoint. EMA is broken (0.053 AP vs 0.236 regular). Analysis: Need to submit eval immediately with the latest best checkpoint (best_v5.pt) to get a test score before time runs out. The model was still improving so this should beat 0.2136. Decision: Submit eval with best_v5.pt now.
